mapper.select: SELECT agent_id, client_id, client_role, user_prompt, flow_seq FROM ai_flow WHERE agent_id = #{agentId} ORDER BY flow_seq ASC, id ASC
SELECT agent_id, client_id, client_role, user_prompt, flow_seq FROM ai_flow WHERE agent_id = #{agentId} ORDER BY flow_seq ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_flow (agent_id, client_id, client_role, user_prompt, flow_seq) VALUES (#{agentId}, #{clientId}, #{clientRole}, #{userPrompt}, #{flowSeq})
